;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Entry point of Lode Runner for PET. Initializes hardware and state, sets up IRQ, and enters main loop.
;
;Inputs: None
;Outputs: $50 (random seed), $67 (game state flag), $90/$91 (IRQ vector)
;Side Effects: Configures VIA registers ($E84C, $E84B, $E84A, $E848), enables interrupts.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Interface/Menu Orchestration Tick.
;Fires on hardware interrupt vector when game is in state 0 (title/menus).
;Sequentially orchestrates static frame rendering and keyboard sequences.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Orchestrates menu sub-states loops.
;Side Effects: Acknowledges VIA interrupt by reading $E812. Restores Y, X, A registers sequence.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Central Gameplay Orchestration Tick.
;Fires on hardware interrupt vector. Sequentially orchestrates audio,
;rendering, dynamic array ticks, collision dispatchers, and keyboard/actors.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Orchestrates full gameplay subsystems loops sequentially.
;Side Effects: Clear updates vectors sequence frames.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Initializes a completely new game.
;Flushes sound memory, resets BCD scores to zero, clears arrays via $0780.
;
;Inputs: Variable array arrays.
;Outputs: Cleared arrays, score variables reset to 0.
;Side Effects: Calls init routines, jumps to main loop at $06F6.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Clears the 23-row gameplay grid using spaces ($20).
;clever memory layout idioms: Each grid row is assigned exactly one memory page
;(from $6700 to $7D00) for multiplication-free coordinate access.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Fills column bytes 42..0 in row pages $67..$7D with space.
;Side Effects: None.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
clear_gameplay_grid

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Patcher for 80-column screen compatibility on Commodore PET business models.
;If screen_width ($51) is 80, loops through memory operands of main drawing loops
;and patches them to use 80-byte offsets instead of 40-byte offsets.
;
;Inputs: screen_width variable ($51).
;Outputs: Patches drawing vectors at $0886 and $0927.
;Side Effects: Self-modifying code.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;Draws the playfield border box on the PET screen at $8000.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Initializes 6522 VIA audio engines hardware.
;Configures ACR at $E84B for free-running Timer 2 audio sequencing,
;and clears sound sequential array flags variables.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Modifies VIA absolute vectors at $E84A, $E84B, and $E848.
;Side Effects: Resets dynamic audio arrays.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

$0C86a9 00lda#$00
$0C888d 48 e8sta$e848; Timer 2 LO
$0C8B8d 7a 0cstasound_active_flag
$0C8E8d 7b 0cstasound_table_index
$0C9160rts
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Instantly halts hardware audio.
;Writes $00 to the 6522 VIA Shift Register at $E84A to silence speaker.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Writes to absolute vector $E84A.
;Side Effects: Silences speaker.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;Manages game state flags and animation timers based on $0DB1.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Writes 4 bytes from data_buf_0..3 to memory calculated from draw_offset and draw_page.
;Uses two pointers to write to consecutive pages.
;
;Inputs: data_buf_0..3, draw_offset (Y), draw_page (High byte)
;Outputs: Modifies memory at calculated addresses.
;Side Effects: Modifies zero page $53 and $55.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

$114A91 52sta(a52),y

$1152c8iny

$115691 54sta(RAM_TEMPF1),y; TEMPF1 Temporary storage for FLPT value.
$1158c8iny
$1159ad b0 0dldadata_buf_3
$115C91 54sta(RAM_TEMPF1),y; TEMPF1 Temporary storage for FLPT value.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Unpacks the compressed level data from $74 into the playfield buffer at $6701.
;Iterates through each byte, extracts nibbles (2 tiles per byte), and renders them.
;Each row consists of 32 tiles. After each row, adjusts the buffer page pointer.
;Reads 4 bytes of metadata at the end of the level data for initial positions.
;
;Inputs: $74 - Pointer to compressed level data.
;Outputs: Populates the playfield buffer and sets initial position variables.
;Side Effects: Modifies $56/$57 (playfield pointer), Y (data index), X (tile index).
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Renders entity actor sprites dynamically into the page-per-row buffers.
;Sequence uses pointers at $56 and writes $CC/$DD characters sequentially.
;
;Inputs: Zero-page pointer $56, character offsets.
;Outputs: Sequentially writes sequences dynamic variables absolute arrays layout.
;Side Effects: Increment zero pointer high-byte sequences explicitly sequences.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
render_actor_sprite

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Performs system initialization and environment detection. Sets up variables,
;configures IRQ vector to $0632, and detects screen width (40 or 80 cols).
;
;Inputs: None (reads screen RAM at $8028)
;Outputs: $51 (screen width), $28..$40 filled with $FF, $1623/$1624 set to $0010
;Side Effects: Calls s1E9D, s1C0D, s0843. Sets IRQ vector at $90/$91.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;State machine executed during interrupts to copy data blocks from binary to RAM.
;Processes one state per execution. Initializes drawing variables on completion.
;
;Inputs: None (uses data embedded in binary)
;Outputs: Populates RAM buffers ($6700..$7E00), updates data_load_state
;Side Effects: Calls process_actors, s0780, s079D. Sets draw_page and draw_offset.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
init_game_data_states

;Polls the static PET hardware keyboard matrix logic explicit variables dynamically sequence.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Inverts the 9-byte tile buffer at $31.
;Iterates through 9 bytes, XORs each with #$FF, and stores them back.
;Used to invert the visual appearance of a tile or 3x3 character block before rendering.
;
;Inputs: Buffer at $31.
;Outputs: Inverts the bytes at $31-$39.
;Side Effects: Modifies Y register.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
$1A7Ca0 00invert_tile_bufferldy#$00; x-ref: $1A0B
$1A7Eb9 31 00b1A7Elda@w a31,y; x-ref: $1A89
$1A8149 ffeor#$ff
$1A8399 31 00sta@w a31,y
$1A86c8iny
$1A87c0 09cpy#$09
$1A89d0 f3bneb1A7E

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Dispatcher for interactions with 2x2 objects.
;Self-modifying code: reads screen tile, masks bit 7, and stores as branch offset at $1C41.
;Branches to different handlers depending on the tile ID.
;
;Inputs: Screen memory at object position.
;Outputs: Modifies BPL operand at $1C41, sets flag at $2212,x.
;Side Effects: Modifies zero page pointers, utilizes self-modifying code.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
dispatch_2x2_tile_action

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Initializes the AI pathfinding or collision buffer at page offset $55 to #$01.
;Iterates through 25 pages (from $67 to $7F), setting the first 32 bytes of each page offset to #$01.
;Also sets up pointers at $5C/$5D and $5E/$5F for other buffers.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Fills the $55-offset buffer with #$01.
;Side Effects: Modifies $5C/$5D, $5E/$5F, Y (data index), $62, and $6E.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;Toggles UI attributes between normal and reverse video (bit 7).
;Used for flashing or highlighting elements. Calls s1C79.
;
;Inputs: $1D61 (state)
;Outputs: Modifies $1D61, $1D7C, $1D99, $1DB0 and attributes.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Applies adjacent binary entity masks explicitly into pointer array coordinates pointers arrays sequence logic.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Updates animation and movement timers for 5-slot 2x2 objects.
;Decays velocity/duration at $2221 towards zero.
;Resets animation timer at $221C to 2 frames and jumps to $23E1 on trigger.
;

;Outputs: Updated timers.
;Side Effects: Jumps to $23E1 for object updates.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;Iterates slots. If positions match, collects gold: decrements sprite state,
;increments gold_count ($24DF), and plays sound effect.

;Outputs: Modifies sprite state, increments gold_count.
;Side Effects: Plays sound by calling $0CC7.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Handles transition when level is completed.
;Fires if level_complete_flag ($2AE1) is 1. Plays sound, updates sidebar,
;delays 32 frames, and reloads level/advances to next.
;
;Inputs: level_complete_flag ($2AE1).
;Outputs: Triggers level transition sequence.
;Side Effects: Plays sound, updates sidebar, resets/advances level.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;Checks if any actors are crushed by dynamic bricks filling back up.
;Iterates 5 2x2 objects in state 0. Compares positions with 10 actors.
;Jumps to $27B7 on collision (death/respawn logic).
;
;Inputs: 2x2 object arrays, actor_status_table, actor coordinates.
;Outputs: Jumps to collision handler at $27B7.
;Side Effects: Modifies zero page $5B.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Checks if player collides with active 2x2 dynamic tiles (traps/bricks).
;On collision, triggers failure sequence: plays sound, runs 64-iteration delay loop,
;and calls $09DD to handle death/reset.
;
;Inputs: draw_page, draw_offset, 2x2 object arrays.
;Outputs: Triggers death sequence.
;Side Effects: Calls sound and delay routines.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
check_player_trap_death

;Checks if player collides with active 1x2 dynamic tiles.

;and calls $09DD to handle death/reset.
;
;Inputs: draw_page, draw_offset, 1x2 object arrays.
;Outputs: Triggers death sequence.
;Side Effects: Calls sound and delay routines.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Checks if player collides with hostile actors (state $04).
;Iterates 10 actors. On collision, triggers failure sequence: plays sound,
;runs 9-iteration delay loop, and calls $09DD to handle death/reset.
;
;Inputs: draw_page, draw_offset, actor arrays.
;Outputs: Triggers death sequence.
;Side Effects: Calls sound and delay routines.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Checks if player has stepped on an invalid tile (e.g. wall or pit).
;Reads screen character at player position. If 0 or bits 7/6 set, triggers death.
;
;Inputs: draw_page, draw_offset, screen memory.
;Outputs: Triggers death sequence on invalid tile.
;Side Effects: Calls sound and delay routines, modifies zero page $5B.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Draws the static UI text labels in the sidebar on the right side of the screen.
;Iterates through several hardcoded strings (LEVEL, GOLD, TIME, POINTS, etc.) and
;copies them to the playfield buffer at offset $23 (column 35) on various rows.
;
;Inputs: Hardcoded strings (txt_level, txt_gold, txt_timer, txt_points, etc.).
;Outputs: Populates the sidebar area in the playfield buffer with static labels.

;Updates the game timer. Decrements frame counter (50 to 0).

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Handles repeating beep sound effects during time bonus countdown.
;Uses timer at $2AE6 to trigger sound index 6 every 8 frames.
;
;Inputs: Timer flag $2AE6, pointer arrays $2AE7..$2AE8
;Outputs: Triggers sound effect, resets timer.
;Side Effects: Modifies zero page $6D.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Decodes dynamic text/frame sequence from $2DAB into the page-per-row gameplay grid.
;Uses control sequences: $FF for newline (increment page), $FE for reset to row 0.
;Clears 32x12 sub-grid modular first.

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Manages modal dialog overlay subsystems (Press Any Key, menus).
;Uses setup flag $2DAA to perform modular frame initialization at Row 21, Col 4 exactly once.
;Iterates input vector polls on consecutive frames.
;
;Inputs: Input modal vectors from s1A65, flag arrays at $2DAA.
;Outputs: Modifies drawing coordinates draw_page and draw_offset.
;Side Effects: Sequential init frames clearing.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Switches gameplay state sequences by modularly patching the hardware IRQ vectors.
;Clears gameplay buffers and re-maps $0314:$0315 vectors sequentially to draw_layout_borders.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Remaps standard $0314 hardware interrupt pointer vectors sequence.
;Side Effects: Self-patching sequences sub-states.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Initializes the visible horizontal layout borders on screen.
;Clears gameplay buffer and draws a border line across row 14 using char $2F.
;Initializes overlay pointer at row 21.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Sequential buffer modifications at row 14.
;Side Effects: Modifies zero page $5B.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Draws the selection cursor box for intro screen options (like Player 1 or 2).
;Calculates the column offset Y = ((option - 1) * 4) + 1 from variable $303D.
;Writes graphic characters to pages $71 (Row 10) and $70 (Row 9) to form the cursor box.
;
;Inputs: Option index at $303D.
;Outputs: Draws graphical selector at rows 9 and 10.
;Side Effects: Modifies $59 (pointer high byte), Y (column offset).
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
draw_intro_selection_cursor

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Clears the padding outline surrounding a 2x2 entity in the offscreen screen
;buffer (around $7100) to erase any artifact left behind if the entity moved by
;1 character.
;
;Inputs: $303D (Entity slot/X index), $58 (low-byte of offscreen buffer pointer)
;Outputs: Buffer cells at $70XX, $71XX, and $72XX cleared with space characters (#$20)
;Side Effects: Temporarily decrements and increments $59 to access adjacent rows.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
erase_sprite_outline

;Checks collision with boundaries of the playfield and updates the movement

;

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Draws static UI decorations or graphical borders onto specific rows in the playfield buffer.
;Fills columns 7 to 34 on pages $7E, $7F, and $75 with specific graphic characters (#$FA, #$C2, #$63).
;Also draws specific character sequences at columns 7-9 and 32-34 on page $74.
;
;Inputs: None.
;Outputs: Writes graphical characters to playfield buffers at pages $7E, $7F, $75, and $74.
;Side Effects: Modifies $59 (pointer high byte), Y (data index).
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Draws the first line of the intro/title screen text into the playfield buffer.
;Sets the high byte of the buffer pointer to $67 (Row 0) and starts at column 7.
;Copies characters from $303E until a #$FF terminator is reached.
;
;Inputs: String at $303E.
;Outputs: Populates row 0 of the intro playfield buffer.
;Side Effects: Modifies $59 (pointer high byte), X (string index), Y (data index).
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
;Dispatches actions based on the user's highlighted menu row in the offscreen buffer.
;
;Inputs: a343C ( iterative page index of highlight cursor)
;Outputs: game_state_flag, updates IRQ shadows vectors at $0314 to tick_gameplay.
;Side Effects: Diverts vector sequence flows to break iterative loop sequences.
;=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
menu_dispatch_selection
$37B0ad 3c 34ldaa343C; x-ref: $36D6
$37B3c9 72cmp#$72
$37B5d0 0dbneb37C4
$37B7a9 01lda#$01
$37B985 67stagame_state_flag; ARGHO Floating Accum. #2: Mantissa
$37BBa9 4alda#<tick_gameplay
$37BD85 90staRAM_CINV; CINV Vector: Hardware Interrupt
$37BFa9 06lda#>tick_gameplay
$37C185 91staa91
$37C360rts
$37C4c9 74b37C4cmp#$74; x-ref: $37B5
$37C6d0 07bneb37CF
$37C820 dd 09jsrrender_actor_stream
$37CB20 11 07jsrapply_score_penalty
$37CE60rts

$37D1d0 07bneb37DA
$37D320 dd 09jsrrender_actor_stream
$37D620 bf 30jsrswitch_state_to_borders
$37D960rts
